prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约94→→435→78→107，近两年呈后移趋势（78→107），2025年基准约107名；2023年出现异常高位（435）可能受当年招生波动影响，2024年迅速回稳；本省理科/物理类计划2021年4人、2023年3人、2024年3人、2025年5人；2026年计划5人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招信号。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2021–2026年稳定第5名，属全国Top5顶尖高校，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年声誉评价偏负面（主要涉及师德师风与学校管理类舆情），但抖音热度排名第4（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度仍处高位；2025年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学A++等科研成果）；历史投档异常方面2021–2024年均有偏负面信号但未出现严重断档；复旦大学A+学科包括哲学、理论经济学、政治学、数学、物理学、生物学、中国史、中国语言文学、新闻传播学、马克思主义理论、公共卫生与预防医学等，A-及以上学科超25个；物理类招生专业（工科试验班集成电路/计算与智能、理科试验班相辉计划）对应电子科学与技术A、计算机科学与技术A、数学A+、物理学A+等，学科实力顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信2024年高热推荐，计算机类推荐（偏热），电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，工科热门方向持续升温；内蒙古2026年高考总考生约154000人，较2025年116360人增长约32.3%，考生规模大幅扩大，竞争显著加剧；复旦大学位于上海，属一线城市高校，对内蒙古高分考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在内蒙古招生规模极小（5人左右），招生占比极低，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合近两年位次后移趋势（78→107）、2026年招生计划持平、本省考生总数大幅增加（+32.3%）及工科专业热度持续高位，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧；预测最低位次约115名，区间103–127名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（集成电路领军人才班）
- 工科试验班（计算与智能领军人才班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（集成电路与微纳电子创新学院）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班（相辉学堂相辉计划）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（103–127名）内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如103名以内）可重点冲击集成电路领军人才班或计算与智能领军人才班；位次接近区间上限（127名左右）建议以理科试验班相辉计划为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 science/physics category minimum ranking approximately 94→→435→78→107, showing a backward trend in recent two years (78→107), with 2025 baseline around 107; abnormal high ranking in 2023 (435) possibly affected by enrollment fluctuations that year, quickly stabilized in 2024; provincial science/physics category enrollment plan: 4 in 2021, 3 in 2023, 3 in 2024, 5 in 2025; 2026 plan 5, same as 2025, no expansion or contraction signal.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking 2021–2026 stable at 5th, belongs to national Top5 top universities, strong and sustained appeal to high-scoring students; 2026 reputation evaluation slightly negative (mainly involving teacher ethics and school management public opinion), but Douyin popularity ranking 4th (high heat), short video exposure large, application attention still high; 2025 reputation slightly positive (e.g., Journalism and Communication A++ and other research achievements); historical enrollment anomalies: 2021–2024 all had slightly negative signals but no severe gaps; Fudan University A+ disciplines include Philosophy, Theoretical Economics, Political Science, Mathematics, Physics, Biology, Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Marxist Theory, Public Health and Preventive Medicine, etc., with over 25 A- and above disciplines; physics category enrollment majors (Engineering Experimental Class Integrated Circuit/Computing and Intelligence, Science Experimental Class Xianghui Plan) correspond to Electronic Science and Technology A, Computer Science and Technology A, Mathematics A+, Physics A+, etc., with top-tier disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronics/Communication highly recommended in 2024, Computer Science recommended (slightly hot), Electrical Engineering and Automation highly recommended, engineering hot directions continue to heat up; Inner Mongolia 2026 total examinees approximately 154,000, an increase of about 32.3% from 116,360 in 2025, significant expansion of examinee scale, competition notably intensifies; Fudan University located in Shanghai, a first-tier city university, has strong cross-provincial appeal to high-scoring students in Inner Mongolia; its enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia is very small (about 5 people), enrollment proportion extremely low, regional preference has limited impact on ranking.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend in recent two years (78→107), flat 2026 enrollment plan, significant increase in provincial examinee count (+32.3%), and sustained high popularity of engineering majors, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than 2025; predicted minimum ranking approximately 115, range 103–127.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Integrated Circuit Leading Talent Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligence Leading Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Integrated Circuit and Micro-Nano Electronics Innovation College).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Xianghui Plan).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If ranking is within the predicted range (103–127), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, sprint for Tier 1, and use Tier 3 as safety; if ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 103), you can focus on sprinting for the Integrated Circuit Leading Talent Class or Computing and Intelligence Leading Talent Class; if ranking is close to the upper bound (around 127), it is recommended to choose the Science Experimental Class Xianghui Plan as a stable option.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次窄幅波动（33–41）、2026年招生计划持平、本省考生总数大幅增加（+32.4%）及文科类专业热度分化，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧；预测最低位次约39名，区间35–43名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 经济学类（含数理经济拔尖班、经济学国际项目UIPE）
- 新闻传播学类（含望道新闻卓越班等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 中国语言文学类（含中国语言文学博雅班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（35–43名）内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如35名以内）可重点冲击经济学类；位次接近区间上限（43名左右）建议以社会科学试验班或文物与博物馆学为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 41→→40→33→35, fluctuating narrowly within the 33–41 range, with a slight backward shift in the last three years (33→35); the baseline for 2025 is about 35th place; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 6 in 2021, 7 in 2023, 7 in 2024, and 6 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 6, unchanged from 2025, with no signal of expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking stable at 5th from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the national Top 5 elite universities, with strong appeal to top liberal arts candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (mainly related to teacher ethics and school management public opinion), but Douyin popularity ranks 4th (high heat), indicating still high application attention; the 2025 reputation is somewhat positive (e.g., A++ in Journalism and Communication for scientific research achievements); no serious gaps in historical admission anomalies; Fudan University's A+ disciplines include Philosophy, Theoretical Economics, Political Science, Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Marxist Theory, etc.; the liberal arts/history category enrollment majors (Economics, Social Science Pilot Class, Cultural Heritage and Museology, Journalism and Communication, Chinese Language and Literature) correspond to Applied Economics A, Sociology A, Journalism and Communication A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, etc., with top-tier disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance/Economics/Economy in 2024 shows divergence and wait-and-see (leaning hot), Law divergence and wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication clearly discouraged, Chinese Language/Chinese recommended; Inner Mongolia's total number of college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 154,000, an increase of about 32.4% from 116,360 in 2025, with an estimated history category examinees of about 43,200 (32,644 in 2025), indicating significantly intensified competition; Fudan University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city university, with strong cross-provincial appeal to top liberal arts candidates in Inner Mongolia; the university's enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia is very small (about 6 people), with a very low enrollment proportion, so regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings (33–41), the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in the total number of provincial examinees (+32.4%), and the divergence in popularity of liberal arts majors, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 39th, with a range of 35–43.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Economics (including Mathematical Economics Top Class, Economics International Program UIPE)
- Journalism and Communication (including Wangdao Journalism Excellence Class, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Chinese Language and Literature (including Chinese Language and Literature Boya Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Social Science Pilot Class (School of Social Development and Public Policy)
- Cultural Heritage and Museology (including Cultural Heritage and Museology Boya Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (35–43), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 35), you can primarily target Economics; if your ranking is close to the upper bound (around 43), it is advisable to choose Social Science Pilot Class or Cultural Heritage and Museology as a safe option.
